item.title: Yes their support for g*nocide was a formative issue, but also in reality most of the public given enough propaganda can be conv...
item.description:
Yes their support for g*nocide was a formative issue, but also in reality most of the public given enough propaganda can be convinced not to care and Reforming a g*nocidal party is not personally in my top ten things to work on in this imperial state - but if we ARE going to have that convo , don’t forget this



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They admit in private what they often deny in public: birthright uses a whole Lot Of dirty tricks intentionally and passively to...
item.description:
They admit in private what they often deny in public: birthright uses a whole Lot Of dirty tricks intentionally and passively to promote connection to their settler colony



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Cops, like the DOD and the IDF , recognize the power that seeming humanized , personal and s*xy has in neutralizing our ability ...
item.description:
Cops, like the DOD and the IDF , recognize the power that seeming humanized , personal and s*xy has in neutralizing our ability to understand them properly as the foottroops of the empire



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I will repeat: just as Israelis have empathy for their war criminals of choice, I get why Americans do to
item.description:
I will repeat: just as Israelis have empathy for their war criminals of choice, I get why Americans do to. But for the love of god step out of urself and consider the effect this glorification has



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are searching for slight comfort, they are searching for wellness and well-being, at the cost of literal lives of Palestini...
item.description:
They are searching for slight comfort, they are searching for wellness and well-being, at the cost of literal lives of Palestinians.
